title: amorite reforged
description: A mod that add a metal called amorite  which can make powerful armor and tools
body:
a mod that adds a meatal known as amorite it can make tools, aromor and other Materials
i`ve made this mod so there are more miterals and stuff to do in minecarft
**This mod is still in **Alpha**** so pls report bugs if you can
thank you for your suport! :)
